tasks.subject: Task 1: mcp.json — MCP Server Config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire all MCP servers for the seo-content-writer agent.

**Files:**
- Create: `agents/seo-content-writer/mcp.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Has sharepoint, outlook, duckduckgo, fetch, playwright, teams servers
- [ ] OUTLOOK_MAILBOX env var wired
- [ ] Matches marketing-specialist mcp.json structure

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/mcp.json"], "verifyCommand": "cat agents/seo-content-writer/mcp.json | node -e \"JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); console.log('VALID')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Has all 6 MCP servers", "OUTLOOK_MAILBOX env var present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: AGENTS.md — Agent Identity + Phase Routing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full agent instruction file with phase routing table, email rules, blog structure.

**Files:**
- Rewrite: `agents/seo-content-writer/AGENTS.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/AGENTS.md"], "acceptanceCriteria": ["Phase routing table maps all [BLOG-*] prefixes", "Email routing rules present", "All env vars listed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: bi-weekly-blog-post.md — Orchestrator Routine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Orchestrator reads issue description, bootstraps run folder, creates [BLOG-RESEARCH] child.

**Files:**
- Create: `agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post.md`
- Create dir: `agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/`

{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post.md"], "acceptanceCriteria": ["topic: line extraction", "duplicate check", "run-state.json schema complete", "[BLOG-RESEARCH] child creation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: research.md — SERP Research Phase
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SERP research, competitor analysis, gap identification, create [BLOG-WRITE] child.

- Create: `agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/research.md`

{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/research.md"], "acceptanceCriteria": ["run_state_path extraction", "4 DuckDuckGo queries", "top 3 fetch", "run-state.json research section", "[BLOG-WRITE] child"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: write.md — Blog Writing Phase
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write 1800-2500 word post from research, save draft.md, create [BLOG-SEO-CHECK] child.

**Files:**
- Create: `agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/write.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/write.md"], "acceptanceCriteria": ["research section read", "frontmatter in draft", "1800 word minimum gate", "[BLOG-SEO-CHECK] child"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: seo-check.md — Keyword Scoring Phase
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Score keywords from config.md cluster, auto-fix <5, gate on overall ≥70, create [BLOG-EMAIL] child.

**Files:**
- Create: `agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/seo-check.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/seo-check.md"], "acceptanceCriteria": ["config.md cluster load", "1-10 scoring", "auto-fix <5", "gate <70", "draft.md updated", "scorecard saved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: email.md — Approval Email Phase
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Send approval email, store conversationId + messageId, set parent in_review, exit.

**Files:**
- Create: `agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/email.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/email.md"], "acceptanceCriteria": ["routing from category", "CC naveen always", "conversationId stored", "awaiting_reply status", "parent in_review"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: revise.md — Revision Phase
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply reviewer changes to draft.md, re-check SEO inline, reply to email thread, loop back to awaiting_reply.

**Files:**
- Create: `agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/revise.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/revise.md"], "acceptanceCriteria": ["reply_message_id in description", "max revision block", "draft.md updated", "inline SEO check", "thread reply sent"]}
```

tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert draft to Portable Text, POST to /api/blog/push, save publishResponseId, create [BLOG-AUDIT] child.

{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/publish.md"], "acceptanceCriteria": ["publish_queued guard", "md-to-portable-text.js invocation", "POST to /api/blog/push", "publishResponseId captured", "[BLOG-AUDIT] child"]}
```

tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write audit.md, update config.md posted log, clear activeRunFolder, close parent issue.

{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/routines/bi-weekly-blog-post/audit.md"], "acceptanceCriteria": ["audit.md full summary", "config.md posted_log updated", "activeRunFolder cleared", "parent issue closed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: email-monitor.md — Reply Monitoring Routine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 6-hour cron that checks inbox for replies, creates [BLOG-REVISE] or [BLOG-PUBLISH] sub-issue.

**Files:**
- Create: `agents/seo-content-writer/routines/email-monitor.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/seo-content-writer/routines/email-monitor.md"], "acceptanceCriteria": ["activeRunFolder empty exit", "awaiting_reply check", "conversationId filter", "OOO skip", "BLOG-REVISE creation", "BLOG-PUBLISH creation", "start over handling"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: scripts/md-to-portable-text.js — Markdown Converter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Node.js CLI that converts markdown to Sanity Portable Text JSON array.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/md-to-portable-text.js`

**Verify:** `echo '# Hello\n\n**bold**' > /tmp/t.md && node scripts/md-to-portable-text.js /tmp/t.md | node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); console.log('VALID JSON')"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/md-to-portable-text.js"], "verifyCommand": "echo '# Hello' > /tmp/t.md && node scripts/md-to-portable-text.js /tmp/t.md | node -e \"JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); console.log('VALID JSON')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["argv[2] input", "valid JSON output", "H1-H6 headings", "inline marks", "frontmatter stripped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Verify all files and final clean-up
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify all 12 agent files present, remove old phases/ dir, final git status clean.

**Verify:** `find agents/seo-content-writer -type f | sort && git status`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "find agents/seo-content-writer -type f | sort && git status", "acceptanceCriteria": ["12 files present", "no phases/ directory", "git status clean"]}
```
